title: MOTOR_EXECUTOR_WIRING_v1
pattern: CF motor (clock) POSTs one bounded tick to HTTP executor (Python). Executor is swappable via URL secret only.

cutover.description: One env/secret change on CF worker — swap executor URL, manual tick verify, done.

founder_gate.rule: New compute vendor → stop dispatch, founder approval, doctrine entry required.
founder_gate.dispatch_template_check: does this task add a vendor? → stop, founder

teardown.rule: Non-canonical executor: app destroyed, secrets revoked, DNS/URL refs removed, deletion receipt — not parked, not fallback.
